query: UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/pnNbEUzUJFcDlwPi.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Toffee%' OR nameAr LIKE '%توفي%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/FQLZSKumDzDwNMjp.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Lollipop%' OR nameAr LIKE '%مصاصات%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/nCmATQUwnmlsLFqY.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Coffee%' OR nameAr LIKE '%قهوة%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/FcHJhkPyCxxzUGUf.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Nut%' OR nameAr LIKE '%مكسرات%'; UPDATE categories SET image = 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663029238813/WSbdfpOtiErhGOCl.jpg' WHERE nameEn LIKE '%Juice%' OR nameAr LIKE '%عصير%'
